case_title: PADILLA, HILDA vs. AVALOS, RICARDO et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PADILLA, HILDA AS TO DEFENDANT AVALOS, RICARDO AVALOS,INEZ IND/DBA R AND I JANITORIAL SERVICE

NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO POST - JUDGMENT DISCOVERY; AND FOR AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF PADILLA, HILDA HEARING SET FOR DEC-19-2008 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 612
MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-19-2008 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 612

DISCOVERY 612, PLAINTIFF HILDA PADILLA'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO POST-JUDGMENT DISCOVERY IS GRANTED. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST DEFENDANT IN THE AMOUNT OF $340, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED (SEE MINI MINUTES FOR DETAILS)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Post - Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-19-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff Hilda Padilla's Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
